title: breonia havilandiana
intro: Breonia havilandiana, also known as Breonia or Haviland's Breonia, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, inflammation, and as an antiseptic agent. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Breonia havilandiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
